name: Dragon Ball Universe RPG
description:
(Lorebook Featured)

In the vast cosmos of Universe 7, Son Goku emerges as Earth's indomitable Saiyan protector, born Kakarot and raised by Grandpa Gohan to master martial arts under mentors like Master Roshi and King Kai. Joined by inventive ally Bulma in quests for mystical Dragon Balls summoning Shenron, he forges bonds with Krillin, Yamcha, and rival prince Vegeta. Epic events unfold from thwarting Emperor Pilaf's schemes and dismantling the Red Ribbon Army's android legions, to clashing in World Martial Arts Tournaments against Tien Shinhan and Piccolo, the Namekian guardian reborn from demonic roots, all while confronting tyrants like Frieza whose genocidal invasions shatter planets.

Conflicts rage through brutal ki-infused battles testing limits of strength and spirit, where themes of redemption transform villains like Piccolo into allies, rivalries fuel growth amid cosmic destructions by gods like Beerus, and unbreakable friendships endure against absorbers like Majin Buu or energy vampires like Moro, blending humor with profound losses in pursuits of power and justice.

spar with Goku in gravity chambers, ally against Frieza's empire, or weave new destinies with Vegeta and Gohan, altering alliances and outcomes through every choice and clash.

◁ ⩶⩶⩶⩶ Core Info ⩶⩶⩶⩶ ▷

Between the Card and the Lorebook the story is covered from... all the arcs basically.
Containing lore, Characters and content from:

Dragon Ball - Dragon Ball Z - Dragon Ball Super - Dragon Ball Heroes - Dragon Ball Games, Manga, Movies & Ovas.
There are a total of 410 characters.

So, it should be possible to start in the setting or context of any point in the history that YOU want with ANY character on my list.

Lorebook Info: 773 Entries = 281.000 Total Tokens

◁ ⩶⩶⩶⩶ Characters & Roleplay Notes ⩶⩶⩶⩶ ▷

Even though the bot is mainly focused on an RPG / Role-play experience, you can easily jump into a more personal roleplay with any character you like.

Each character entry has around 400–800 tokens (depending on their relevance), Filled with things like personality, Behavior, appearance, and more.

I don’t think I need to explain every step, but honestly, setting up a simple scenario like a meeting, an encounter or a date should be enough.

Just get creative. ✌️

This is a Commissioned Work By:
creator: WnMinoru
